steps.title: Identify the proportional relationship
steps.content: When Maya works $z$ hours, she earns $14.25z$ dollars. This establishes a direct proportion: earnings scale proportionally with hours. If the number of hours multiplies by a factor, earnings multiply by that same factor.

steps.title: Apply the scaling factor
steps.content:
Maya now works $4z$ hours, which is 4 times as many hours as $z$. Therefore, her earnings also multiply by 4:
$$4 \times (14.25z)$$
This matches the correct answer — A is correct.
